name: alpha-arena
description: AI Trading Battleground — Real trades, real funds, real competition on X Layer mainnet

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../nextjs && npm install && cd ../contracts && npm install
scripts.contract:deploy: cd contracts && npx hardhat run deploy.js --network xlayer
scripts.contract:deploy:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run deploy.js --network xlayer_testnet
